# Quick Fix: Domain Migration redcoreos.net → ouden.cc
Generated: 2026-04-02T19-51-44Z

## Change Made
Replaced all `redcoreos.net` (and legacy `Oudenos.net`) domain references in canonical and OG URL metadata. Route paths were preserved unchanged.

## Files Modified

1. `apps/web/src/app/redcore-tuning/page.tsx` — canonical, OG url, jsonLd url (3 occurrences)
2. `apps/web/src/app/donate/page.tsx` — canonical, OG url (2 occurrences)
3. `apps/web/src/app/support/page.tsx` — canonical, OG url (2 occurrences; email addresses left intact)
4. `apps/web/src/app/downloads/page.tsx` — canonical, OG url (2 occurrences)
5. `apps/web/src/app/redcore-os/page.tsx` — canonical, OG url, jsonLd url (3 occurrences)
6. `apps/web/src/app/why-redcore/page.tsx` — canonical, OG url (2 occurrences)

8. `apps/web/src/app/windows-11-debloat/page.tsx` — canonical, OG url (2 occurrences, were `Oudenos.net`)

## Pattern Followed
- Only domain portion changed: `https://redcoreos.net` → `https://ouden.cc`
- Route paths like `/redcore-os`, `/redcore-tuning`, `/why-redcore` preserved
- Email addresses (`support@redcoreos.net` etc.) in support/page.tsx left unchanged — those are contact email addresses, not URLs

## Notes
Other files outside scope still have `Oudenos.net` references: `terms/page.tsx`, `privacy/page.tsx`, `work-pc-debloat/page.tsx`, `custom-windows/page.tsx`. These were not in the task list.
